text.content: Shield, Lex, and Sage were stood up quickly as part of the foundation build. Their current SOUL.md, RULES.md, and skill files are functional but shallow. Need a deep review of: (1) Scope — what each agent is actually responsible for, what falls through the cracks, overlap between the three. (2) Skills — what tools, scripts, and capabilities each agent should have. (3) Rules — are the current rules comprehensive enough for a production consulting platform? (4) Coverage gaps — content governance, client data handling, IP protection, AU compliance specifics. (5) Integration with Spark, Aria, and future agents — governance triad should gate ALL outbound content and client-facing work, not just ad-hoc requests. Outcome: hardened, production-grade governance with clear accountability and no gaps.
